description: A fine soft lustrous fiber produced by silkworms; the smoothest natural textile. 'Sileo' names what worms weave—the liquid thread that becomes luxury.
sound_symbolism: The word slides smooth. 'Si' slips with silken glide, fiber sliding. 'Le' flows with liquid drape. Then 'o' opens to soft fullness.
grammatical_notes: Functions as noun: 'lo sileo' (the silk). Finest fiber, from cocoons. For luxury garments, art, ceremony.

pillars.art-nouveau-aesthetics: Silk as flowing luxury—the draping fabric of Art Nouveau fashion and decoration.
pillars.pre-industrial-wisdom: Silk connected worlds—the trade routes named for this precious thread.
